query: CREATE TABLE `churches` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `description` text, `logoUrl` text, `bannerUrl` text, `primaryColor` varchar(20) DEFAULT '#7C3AED', `secondaryColor` varchar(20) DEFAULT '#4C1D95', `accentColor` varchar(20) DEFAULT '#DDD6FE', `website` text, `address` text, `city` varchar(100), `state` varchar(50), `country` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Brasil', `phone` varchar(32), `email` varchar(320), `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `churches_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `churches_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`));
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4JDr9ofb1QvLzwF.root --database UszLooJWtZFfrLzaWSt4eT --execute CREATE TABLE `churches` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL, `description` text, `logoUrl` text, `bannerUrl` text, `primaryColor` varchar(20) DEFAULT '#7C3AED', `secondaryColor` varchar(20) DEFAULT '#4C1D95', `accentColor` varchar(20) DEFAULT '#DDD6FE', `website` text, `address` text, `city` varchar(100), `state` varchar(50), `country` varchar(50) DEFAULT 'Brasil', `phone` varchar(32), `email` varchar(320), `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `churches_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`), CONSTRAINT `churches_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`));
